judgment.summary: High-growth cybersecurity business with strong cash flow and gross margins but trading at a steep valuation with negative net profitability.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS of 1.12 beat the 1.10 estimate; next earnings date is 2026-06-03.
positives: Gross margin 74.8% — indicates strong core profitability.
Free cash flow (TTM) $1.60B — shows the ability to generate significant liquidity.
Total cash $5.23B vs total debt $820.08M — provides a very strong liquidity position.
Analyst growth est for current Q 46.2% — implies strong upcoming growth momentum.
negatives: Forward P/E 96.25 — reflects a very high valuation relative to earnings.
Profit margin -3.4% — indicates the company is currently not net profitable.
Mean analyst target $497.55 — sits significantly below the current spot price of $594.08.
Price/Sales (TTM) 31.42 — suggests the stock is priced at a high premium to revenue.

news.paragraph: CrowdStrike is experiencing significant upward momentum, recently hitting new highs and receiving a price target upgrade from RBC to $650. The company is also seeing increased attention due to the rise of AI-driven attacks on financial institutions. Options traders should weigh this positive analyst sentiment and sector demand when considering new positions.
